5_data_sources.desc: Cac nguon data thu thap (chi tiet: DATA_SOURCES.md)

text_kb.fandom_en: data/fandom/*.json - 269 shikigami, 913 skills, 69 souls, 26 modes, battle, progression (EN 100%)
text_kb.oas_features: knowledge/oas_features.json - 52 chuc nang game tu OAS (CN, dich CN->EN)
text_kb.wiki_db_supabase: data/wiki_db/*.json - SUPABASE OPEN API (trmzaiu): 271 shikigami (skill/onibi/cooldown/stat ATK-HP-DEF-SPD-Crit min-max/build role-souls-substats/evolution/skin), 64 soul, 6 onmyoji, 480 effect, 33 tag, da ngon ngu en/cn/jp/vn. TRACKED git. Regen: fetch_wiki_db.py
text_kb.strategy_guides_en: data/external/firechain/guides_en/*.md - 4 guide EN thuc chien (Orochi Floor10 speedrun/Yamabunny/Duel Advanced) co team setup chi tiet. Da nap vao KB (type 'strategy'). TRACKED

images.wiki_images_en: data/external/wiki/ - ~6005 anh EN (icon461/image458/skill933/skin713/shard270/bio61/soul/onmyoji234/stats38) ten file = ten EN sach. gitignored. Regen: rebuild_assets.py wiki
images.flow_assets_ingame: data/external/flow_assets/ - 470 anh RIPPED IN-GAME (270 shiki theo rarity sp/ssr/sr/r/n + 137 yuhun + 48 skill, id-based; map id->name=flow_shikigami.json). gitignored. Regen: rebuild_assets.py flow

5_data_sources.supabase_access: KY THUAT: trich supabaseUrl+anonKey tu site Nuxt deployed (grep _nuxt/*.js 'supabaseUrl/supabaseKey'). REST: GET {url}/rest/v1/{Table}?select=*&order=id&limit=1000&offset=N, headers apikey+Bearer. anon key public read-only. Dung lai cho nguon Supabase khac
